description: iOS / iPadOS Metal profiling matrix. Targets the @elizaos/llama-cpp-capacitor build once the dylib lands (porting plan task #21). Excludes QJL until the MSL kernel is shipped. Includes DFlash because spec-decode is host-side and ports cleanly to Metal.

prompts.text: What is the capital of France?
Explain in three sentences why the sky is blue.
Write a 200-word story about a small robot who wants to learn to paint.
